title: Evidence-based Cesarean safety clinical protocol
author: Chen, Chi Chiung Grace
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a combined list of an evidence-based clinical practice protocol designed to reduce cesarean section-associated surgical site infection. These components were identified on systematic review of the literature. Components and their rationale are included in the table attached.
steps_raw: This is a combined list of an evidence-based clinical practice protocol designed to reduce cesarean section-associated surgical site infection. These components were identified on systematic review of the literature. Components and their rationale are included in the table attached.
